_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

tests.assertion: notification_templates, notification_events, notification_deliveries and notification_preferences collections exist.
Real delivery requires active approved template.
Duplicate notification event idempotency key does not create duplicate event.
Duplicate delivery idempotency does not send twice.
Client supplied recipients are ignored for business events.
School coordinator sees only own school in-app notifications.
Public role cannot read notification queue or templates.
Provider secrets are never exposed to browser/API response.
Notification payload does not include raw OMR, answer keys or private file URLs.
Unsigned provider webhook cannot change delivery status.
Failed delivery retries stop at max_retry_count.
Every future notification bug fix adds regression tests.

acceptance_criteria: Registered business events can create notification events.
Deliveries are idempotent and retry safely.
School sees only own in-app notifications.
Provider secrets and sensitive payloads are protected.
